CheckTitle: E2E Networks nodes do not have rescue mode enabled
Description: **E2E Networks nodes** should not be running in **rescue mode**, which grants elevated filesystem access and can bypass normal operating controls.
Risk: **Rescue mode** provides elevated access to node filesystems and can bypass normal operating controls, increasing the risk of unauthorized data access or persistence.

Recommendation.Text: Disable **rescue mode** on nodes once recovery tasks are complete to restore normal operating controls.
